power_rail_names: 25V 10uF X5R ±20% 0603 Multilayer Ceramic Capacitors MLCC - SMD/SMT ROHS
25V 22uF X5R ±20% 0805 Multilayer Ceramic Capacitors MLCC - SMD/SMT ROHS

+5V analog power supply for PCM3060 (max 36mA)

LP2985-5.0 low-noise LDO.

At 9V incoming and let's say max 50mA current,
a 22R resistor drops ~1 volt. We've got headroom.

The 22R / 10uF low pass filter frequency is ~700Hz,
getting rid of HF switching noise (possibly from the
digital +3.3V side, or possibly from upstream).

The LDO should be more than capable of dealing with
any remaining ripple

+3V3 as per the RP2354A minimal board.

The NCP1117 is a huge component and 1A is overspecced,
but we've got room.
+3V3 power and 12MHz crystal as per hw design datasheet\n\nThat NCP1117 is huge compared to other components...
